headlines.title: Cerebras falls 10% after chipmaker forecasts shrinking margin in first earnings report since IPO
headlines.summary: Cerebras went public on the Nasdaq in May, giving Wall Street access to a pureplay AI company.

headlines.title: SpaceX raises $25 billion in debt sale less than two weeks after IPO
headlines.summary: SpaceX raised $25 billion in a debt sale, after seeing nearly $90 billion worth of orders, sources say.

headlines.title: Alphabet added to Dow Jones Industrial Average, replacing Verizon
headlines.summary: Alphabet will replace Verizon in the Dow Jones Industrial Average.

headlines.title: Factory job cuts in June neared financial crisis and Covid levels, S&P says
headlines.summary: Though the firm's manufacturing index ran better than expected for June, it came largely from an inventory rebuild and despite sharp job cuts.

headlines.title: FedEx posts strong earnings results in last quarter with freight business
headlines.summary: FedEx posted strong fiscal fourth quarter earnings on Tuesday in the company's last quarter that included the freight business before its spin-off.

headlines.title: PGA Tour CEO Brian Rolapp unveils sweeping changes to professional golf
headlines.summary: Changes to the PGA Tour are designed to elevate competition and raise payouts for winners.

headlines.title: Mamdani-backed candidates are likely to win in NYC primaries, prediction market traders expect
headlines.summary: Voters are heading to the polls in New York, with four competitive races in Democratic congressional primaries in focus.

headlines.title: SpaceX seeing some interest from short sellers, but many still afraid to bet against Musk
headlines.summary: About 40 million SpaceX shares are sold short, roughly 5% to 7% of the shares that are publicly available to trade, according to an estimate by S3 Partners.

headlines.title: Meta is building a prediction markets app. These stocks fell in response
headlines.summary: The report said that CEO Mark Zuckerberg directed staff to develop a prediction markets platform, internally known as "Arena."

headlines.title: Traders are loving this cheap way to make big bets against chip stocks
headlines.summary: Just a day after making new all-time records, the semiconductor sector is down almost 7% and traders are finding a cheap way to bet on a bigger pivot.

headlines.title: Nvidia's stock struggles as Kalshi traders bet chip prices are coming down
headlines.summary: Shares of Nvidia have been faltering recently — and Kalshi traders predict that what the company can charge for chips is also declining.

headlines.title: ‘It seems too good to be true’: At a steak-dinner retirement seminar, the guy said annuities can outperform the market. Is that true?
headlines.summary: “He claimed that fixed-rate annuities are the sparkly, rainbow-fairyland of investments.”

headlines.title: I want to leave everything to my sons, but I’m terrified they’ll give it to my ex-husband. How do I prevent this?
headlines.summary: “I would not like my money to fall into the hands of my former spouse.”

headlines.title: ‘We own our home outright’: I am 67 and earn $100,000. Do I take my $30,000-a-year Social Security now or wait?
headlines.summary: “We have combined savings of $950,000 in retirement plans, Roth IRAs and Treasuries.”

headlines.title: Alphabet’s stock is set to join the Dow. Here’s which company is getting the boot.
headlines.summary: Dow Industrial’s index provider hails Alphabet as ‘more representative’ of communications sector.

headlines.title: Cerebras delivers its first earnings report — but it’s not enough to lift the stock
headlines.summary: Despite upbeat revenue figures, Cerebras’s stock was falling in after-hours trading.

headlines.title: SpaceX reveals pricing details for what could be one of the year’s biggest debt deals
headlines.summary: The offering is set to close on Friday and help SpaceX pay off its existing debt

candidates.thesis: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing is a leader in advanced semiconductor manufacturing, benefiting from secular growth in AI, cloud computing, and 5G. Strong fundamentals and positioned well for long-term growth in compute infrastructure.
CrowdStrike is a leader in cybersecurity, addressing increasing demand for cloud-based endpoint protection and threat intelligence. Secular growth in cybersecurity spending supports long-term upside.

BWX Technologies is a key player in small modular reactors and clean energy solutions, aligning with the client's preference for clean energy themes. Stable fundamentals and government-backed contracts provide downside protection.

Advanced Micro Devices is a leader in high-performance computing and AI chips, benefiting from secular growth in AI adoption and compute infrastructure. Recent pullback provides an attractive entry point.

ASML is the global leader in lithography systems critical for advanced semiconductor manufacturing. Positioned to benefit from long-term growth in AI and compute infrastructure. Strong moat and pricing power.
